title: Static HTML
excerpt: description: Deploy any static HTML website to Cloudflare Pages without a framework. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Cloudflare supports deploying any static HTML website to Cloudflare Pages. If you manage your website without using a framework or static site generator, or if your framework is not listed in [Framework guides](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/framework-guides/), you can still deploy it using this guide. All of the framework guides assume you already have a fundamental understanding of [Git ↗](https://git-scm.com/).…
